title: Germlin's Tipsy
description: A mod which adds new drinks, some good for you some not...
body:
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a808b1bfb1cd6c9b45644536db92f3fa18e1366e.png)

Tipsy is a minecraft mod for fabric 1.20.1 this mod adds over 10 new drinks all with there own alcohol percentages. In this mod you will have to brew, boil and ferment items to craft these new drinks and reap there custom affects.

With vanilla like gameplay and models you can be sure that this lightweight mod will be a perfect addition to your modpack. 
![Steve Enjoying A Cold One](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad38e7d611a8636201dbb5b51ff8e6cdfd4c6e91.png)
Inspired By :  [Let's Do] Vinery, [Let's Do] Brewery
![New Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87ecd2056c2654ff4c076fdefdc61afd781dbd6a.png)
